name: Noman Halai
title: .NET Developer
subtitle: Full-Stack · Ahmedabad, IN
about: 4 years of hands-on experience designing and shipping scalable web, mobile, and enterprise applications. Specializing in .NET Core, Flutter, and SQL with a focus on clean architecture and real-world impact.

experience.desc: Working on full-stack development of web and mobile applications using .NET technologies. Responsible for designing APIs, database logic, and front-end integration across multiple high-impact projects including multi-platform visitor management systems and enterprise-level CRM tools.

Developed and maintained enterprise and e-commerce applications across the full stack. Involved in end-to-end project execution including coding, testing, and deployment. Built training portals and company management tools with payroll and attendance modules.

projects.name: Visitor Management System
projects.desc: Multi-platform visitor & society management system with gate pass generation, resident alerts, check-in/out tracking, and staff monitoring. Built with .NET Web API and Flutter.

projects.name: MarketSync
projects.desc: Enterprise-level toolset for managing email campaigns, print mailings, and event workflows. Integrated with Salesforce via secure .NET APIs with scalable modules for large client needs.

projects.name: Allure Products
projects.desc: B2C e-commerce platform with product listing, shopping cart, order processing, and payment integration. Handled complete front-end and back-end development alongside database design.

projects.name: DriveThru System
projects.desc: Training portal for finance and insurance brokers with user registration, content modules, and access control. Delivered a cost-effective platform with scalability for license tracking.

projects.name: Company Workdays System
projects.desc: Comprehensive company management tool with attendance, payroll, project tracking, and event management modules. Streamlined internal operations through custom dashboards and reporting.
